basic_details.job_title: Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc./M.Tech. in respective subject, Minimum two years of teaching experience in JEE/NEET preparation from reputed Coaching Institutes, Preference to Ph.D. or alumni of IITs/NITs
qualification.details: Biology Faculty: M.Sc./M.Tech. in Biology with minimum two years of teaching experience in JEE/NEET preparation from reputed Coaching Institutes. Preference to Ph.D. or IITs/NITs alumni. Mathematics Faculty: M.Sc./M.Tech. in Mathematics with minimum two years of teaching experience in JEE/NEET preparation from reputed Coaching Institutes. Preference to Ph.D. or IITs/NITs alumni. Physics Faculty: M.Sc./M.Tech. in Physics with minimum two years of teaching experience in JEE/NEET preparation from reputed Coaching Institutes. Preference to Ph.D. or IITs/NITs alumni. Chemistry Faculty: M.Sc./M.Tech. in Chemistry with minimum two years of teaching experience in JEE/NEET preparation from reputed Coaching Institutes. Preference to Ph.D. or IITs/NITs alumni.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Faculty posts at Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur is scheduled for 16 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What are the total number of vacancies announced by Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur?
faq.answer: Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur has announced a total of 4 vacancies for the Faculty positions. These are distributed across different subjects.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Faculty posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc./M.Tech. in their respective subject. Additionally, a minimum of two years of teaching experience in JEE/NEET preparation from reputed coaching institutes is required.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any preference given to certain candidates during the selection process?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates who hold a Ph.D. or are alumni of IITs/NITs.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Faculty posts will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 70,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and a Written Test. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The Faculty positions are contractual in nature, offering a fixed-term employment opportunity.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
